response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer across multiple industries and stacks, with a strong alignment to the required technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, etc.). His work on AI-agent infrastructure and testable projects demonstrates deep technical expertise, while his cross-functional roles reflect both technical and collaborative strengths. The only minor concerns are his recent job-hopping and limited exposure to Nest.js, which can be addressed in the interview.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (11+ years) with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React proficiency
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and scalable systems (e.g., MCP code generators, low-latency microservices)
Deep testing and DevOps expertise (TDD, CI/CD, GitLab setup, Kubernetes deployments)
concerns: Frequent job changes (short tenures at some roles) may indicate stability concerns
Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement) on resume
AI agent experience is strong but not explicitly tied to enterprise automation tooling
